briefing.summary: As of 2026-06-16, 3 article(s) from IEEE ComSoc, Fierce Wireless, Mobile World Live cover key stakeholders: "3GPP approves timelines for Release 21: 6G specs set for early 2029"; "Q&A: 6G is coming — Qualcomm's John Smee on AI, connectivity and the future"; "Qualcomm expects AI-boosting 6G devices in 2029, positioning 6G as AI-native".

articles.title: 3GPP approves timelines for Release 21: 6G specs set for early 2029
articles.description: 3GPP TSG RAN #112 in Singapore approved Release 21 timeline. First 6G specs functional freeze March 2027, final freeze December 2028, code freeze March 2029. CP-OFDM confirmed as 6G downlink waveform. Migration architecture decision deferred to September 2026 Madrid meeting.

articles.title: Q&A: 6G is coming — Qualcomm's John Smee on AI, connectivity and the future
articles.description: Qualcomm SVP John Smee outlines 6G strategy: AI-native networks, predictive analytics, and integrated sensing. 6G will deliver quality of service and differentiated services that Wi-Fi cannot match. WRC-27 and LA 2028 Olympics seen as key milestones toward 2029 commercial deployment.

articles.title: Qualcomm expects AI-boosting 6G devices in 2029, positioning 6G as AI-native
articles.description: At MWC Shanghai 2026, Qualcomm SVP John Smee framed 6G as the wireless technology for the age of AI. Pre-commercial devices expected 2028, commercial 2029. 3GPP Release 21 initial approval March 2027. "AI is the new UI" — context-aware agents delivered through voice, glasses, and watches.
